summary: Phase 8 (User Escalation UX) complete. All 2 tasks done. The last 'Not yet implemented' stub in harness-soundness-review SKILL.md has been replaced with detailed SURFACE presentation procedures covering: grouping/prioritizing findings, presenting each finding (what/why/resolution), user interaction patterns (resolve/dismiss/clarify), resolution tracking, re-check flow, and clean exit criteria. Both platform copies are byte-identical.
learnings: State.json was stale from Phase 7 — always verify file contents before trusting state
Single commit for both platform copies ensures Prettier formats identically
